task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the EHR system as 'admin'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or calendar is visible, and the active user is shown as 'admin' (usually in the top right or navigation menu).

task_completion.description: Verify the correct patient is selected for the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Clifford Taylor' or patient ID '8471' is visible in the patient search or selection field within the appointment scheduling dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct provider is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The provider dropdown or selection field in the appointment form is set to 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment is set for tomorrow at 10:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field in the appointment form shows tomorrow's date, and the time fields are set to '10:00 AM' (or 10:00).

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment type is set to 'Office Visit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category or appointment type dropdown in the scheduling form displays 'Office Visit'.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment was successfully scheduled and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment block for 'Clifford Taylor' appears on the calendar at 10:00 AM, or a clear success/confirmation message indicating the appointment was created is visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to schedule the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LibreHealth EHR interface, not terminal windows executing curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction occurred within the actual LibreHealth EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match standard LibreHealth EHR styling and layout, not a text editor, mocked HTML page, or generic form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake success by typing the expected outcome in a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad or nano) open with phrases like 'Appointment scheduled for Clifford Taylor'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Details: Clifford Taylor, PID: 8471, DOB: 1984-08-15. Provider: 'admin' (Administrator role). Appointment Type: 'Office Visit' (Standard LibreHealth EHR category). Time format: 10:00 AM. The application being used is LibreHealth EHR.
